32. Effects of the 3 from Karakāńś. A malefic in the 3 from Karakāńś will
rd
make one valorous, while a benefic in the 3 from Karakāńś will make one
timid.
th th
33-35. Effects of the 4 from Karakāńś. If the 4 from Karakāńś happens to
be occupied by Śukr and Candr, one will own large buildings, like palaces
th
etc. Similar is the effect of an exalted Grah in the said 4 . A house, made
th
of stones, is denoted by the occupation of the 4 from Karakāńś by Rahu
th
and Śani. Mangal and Ketu in the 4 from Karakāńś indicate a house,
th
made of bricks, while Guru in the 4 from Karakāńś denotes a house,
th
made of wood.
